texto: When I was young and it was someone's birthday, I didn't have the money to buy nice presents so I would take my mom's camera and make a movie parody for whoever's birthday it was. When I'd show it them, they'd die laughing. That reaction was a high for me, and I loved that feeling.
explicacao: Citação de David Henrie sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “When I was young and it was someone's birthday, I didn't have the money to buy nice presents so I…” articula humor, money, mom em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e mom.

frase_original: When I was young and it was someone's birthday, I didn't have the money to buy nice presents so I would take my mom's camera and make a movie parody for whoever's birthday it was. When I'd show it them, they'd die laughing. That reaction was a high for me, and I loved that feeling.
